title: Optical Tweezer Arrays: Trapping Single Atoms
description: Master the physics and technology of optical tweezer arrays for neutral atom quantum computing. Learn how tightly focused laser beams create microscopic traps that hold individual atoms with precise spatial control.
learningObjectives: Explain the dipole force mechanism that enables optical trapping of neutral atoms
Calculate trap depth and trapping frequencies for optical tweezers
Describe the role of AC Stark shifts in atom trapping
Understand how acousto-optic deflectors create programmable tweezer arrays
Analyze the trade-offs between trap depth, heating rates, and coherence
